title: borreria poaya var. nervosa
intro: Borreria poaya var. nervosa, also known as the Nervous Borreria plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to Central and South America. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, making it useful for relieving muscle cramps, spasms, and tension. The health benefits of Borreria poaya var. nervosa include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menstrual cramps and PMS. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying the leaves and flowers, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
